text: Has there [not] come upon man a period of time when he was not a thing [even] mentioned?
tl: Hal ataa 'alal insaani heenum minad dahri lam yakun shai'am mazkooraa

text: Indeed, We created man from a sperm-drop mixture that We may try him; and We made him hearing and seeing.
tl: Innaa khalaqnal insaana min nutfatin amshaajin nabta-leehi faja'alnaahu samee'am baseeraa

text: Indeed, We guided him to the way, be he grateful or be he ungrateful.
tl: Innaa hadainaahus sabeela immaa shaakiranw Wa-immaa kafoora

text: Indeed, We have prepared for the disbelievers chains and shackles and a blaze.
tl: Innaaa a'tadnaa lilkaa-fireena salaasila Wa-aghlaalanw Wa-sa'eeraa

text: Indeed, the righteous will drink from a cup [of wine] whose mixture is of Kāfūr,
tl: Innal abraara yashra-boona min kaasin kaana mizaa-juhaa kaafooraa

text: A spring of which the [righteous] servants of Allāh will drink; they will make it gush forth in force [and abundance].
tl: Aynany yashrabu bihaa 'ibaadul laahi yufajjiroonahaa tafjeeraa

text: They [are those who] fulfill [their] vows and fear a Day whose evil will be widespread.
tl: Yoofoona binnazri Wa-yakhaafoona yawman kaana sharruhoo mustateeraa

text: And they give food in spite of love for it to the needy, the orphan, and the captive,
tl: Wa-yut'imoonat ta'aama 'alaa hubbihee miskeenanw Wa-yateemanw Wa-aseeraa

text: [Saying], \"We feed you only for the face [i.e., approval] of Allāh. We wish not from you reward or gratitude.
tl: Innaamaa nut'imukum li-wajhil laahi laa nureedu minkum jazaaa'anw Wa-laa shukooraa

text: Indeed, We fear from our Lord a Day austere and distressful.\"
tl: Innaa nakhaafu mir Rabbinna Yawman 'aboosan qamtareeraa

text: So Allāh will protect them from the evil of that Day and give them radiance and happiness
tl: Fa-waqaahumul laahu sharra zaalikal yawmi Wa-laqqaahum nadratanw Wa-surooraa

text: And will reward them for what they patiently endured [with] a garden [in Paradise] and silk [garments].
tl: Wa-jazaahum bimaa sabaroo janatanw Wa-hareeraa

text: [They will be] reclining therein on adorned couches. They will not see therein any [burning] sun or [freezing] cold.
tl: Muttaki'eena feeha 'alal araaa-'iki laa yarawna feehaa shamsanw Wa-laa zamhareeraa

text: And near above them are its shades, and its [fruit] to be picked will be lowered in compliance.
tl: Wa-daaniyatan 'alaihim zilaaluhaa Wa-zullilat qutoofu-haa tazleela

text: And there will be circulated among them vessels of silver and cups having been [created] clear [as glass],
tl: Wa-yutaafu 'alaihim bi-aaniyatim min fiddatinw Wa-akwaabin kaanat qawaareeraa

text: Clear glasses [made] from silver of which they have determined the measure.
tl: Qawaareera min fiddatin qaddaroohaa taqdeeraa

text: And they will be given to drink a cup [of wine] whose mixture is of ginger
tl: Wa-yuskawna feehaa kaasan kaana mizaajuhaa zanjabeelaa

text: [From] a fountain within it [i.e., Paradise] named Salsabeel.
tl: Aynan feeha tusammaa salsabeelaa

text: There will circulate among them young boys made eternal. When you see them, you would think them [as beautiful as] scattered pearls.
tl: Wa-yatoofu 'alaihim wildaanum mukhalladoona izaa ra-aytahum hasibtahum lu'lu-'am mansoora

text: And when you look there [in Paradise], you will see pleasure and great dominion.
tl: Wa-izaa ra-ayta samma ra-ayta na'eemanw Wa-mulkan kabeera

text: Upon them [i.e., the inhabitants] will be green garments of fine silk and brocade. And they will be adorned with bracelets of silver, and their Lord will give them a purifying drink.
tl: Aaliyahum siyaabu sundusin khudrunw Wa-istabraq, Wa-hullooo asaawira min fiddatinw Wa-saqaahum Rabbuhum sharaaban tahooraa

text: [And it will be said], \"Indeed, this is for you a reward, and your effort has been appreciated.\"
tl: Innaa haazaa kaana lakum jazz-'anw Wa-kaana sa'yukum mashkooraa

text: Indeed, it is We who have sent down to you, [O Muḥammad], the Qur’ān progressively.
tl: Innaa nahnu nazzalnaa 'alaikal quraana tanzeelaa

text: So be patient for the decision of your Lord and do not obey from among them a sinner or ungrateful [disbeliever].
tl: Fasbir lihukmi Rabbika Wa-laa tuti' minhum aasiman aw kafooraa

text: And mention the name of your Lord [in prayer] morning and evening
tl: Wazkuris ma Rabbika bukratanw Wa-aseelaa

text: And during the night prostrate to Him and exalt [i.e., praise] Him a long [part of the] night.
tl: Wa-minal laili fasjud lahoo Wa-sabbihhu lailan taweelaa

text: Indeed, these [disbelievers] love the immediate and leave behind them a grave Day.
tl: Inna haaa'ulaa'i yuhibboona 'aajilata Wa-yazaroona waraaa'ahum yawman saqeelaa

text: We have created them and strengthened their forms, and when We will, We can change their likenesses with [complete] alteration.
tl: Nahnu khalaqnaahum Wa-shadadnaaa asrahum Wa-izaa shi'naa baddalnaaa amsaala-hum tabdeelaa

text: Indeed, this is a reminder, so he who wills may take to his Lord a way.
tl: Inna haazihee tazkiratun fa-man shaaa'at takhaza ilaa rabbihee sabeela

text: And you do not will except that Allāh wills. Indeed, Allāh is ever Knowing and Wise.
tl: Wa-maa tashaaa'oona illaa any yashaaa'al laah; innal laahaa kaana 'Aleeman Hakeema

text: He admits whom He wills into His mercy; but the wrongdoers - He has prepared for them a painful punishment.
tl: Yudkhilu mai yashaaa'u fee rahmatih; wazzaalimeena a'adda lahum 'azaaban aleemaa
